ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range for the size */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range for the size */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Bust measurement range for the size */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the size */,
  "hip_range" TEXT /* Hip measurement range for the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description for the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the size variation */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base size */,
  "height" REAL /* Specific height measurement */,
  "weight" REAL /* Specific weight measurement */,
  "bust" REAL /* Specific bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Specific waist measurement */,
  "hip" REAL /* Specific hip measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_variations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., Dress, Top, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for brand inquiries */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Designer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for analytics entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the given size */,
  "customer_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Number of feedback entries for the size */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range when the size was changed */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range when the size was changed */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Bust measurement range when the size was changed */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist measurement range when the size was changed */,
  "hip_range" TEXT /* Hip measurement range when the size was changed */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
